greeting.title: Hello! My name is Erman
greeting.subtitle: I'm a mobile application developer with strong problem-solving skills, committed to delivering quality in every project.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a developer experienced in building applications for Android, iOS, and the web, and I focus on delivering solutions that run smoothly across different devices. From developing user-friendly mobile apps to designing visually strong websites, I care about delivering high-quality results that meet both functional and design expectations.
about.paragraph2: With a solid understanding of mobile and web development, I bring creative ideas to life in a practical and efficient way. My goal is to ensure that every project I work on provides a smooth and engaging experience for users.
about.paragraph3: I approach each project with a focus on collaboration and deliver tailored solutions that align with the needs and goals of the people and businesses I work with.

whatIDo.title: What I Do

android.title: Android
android.text: I develop native Android apps using modern technologies and best practices.

ios.title: iOS
ios.text: I develop high-quality iOS apps that are fast, reliable, and easy to use.

multiplatform.title: Multiplatform
multiplatform.text: I develop multiplatform apps using technologies like Kotlin Multiplatform, and React Native. With a single codebase, I help you reach both Android and iOS users.

frontEnd.title: Front End
frontEnd.text: I design and develop mobile-first, user-friendly websites using modern web technologies.

whatIDo.footer: Depending on your expectations, I can also collaborate effectively on projects outside my main area of expertise.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If there's a project you'd like to discuss, let's get in touch! Send me an email:
